spec_match.rationale: The live palette and canvas now render same-origin external SVG files through bare URL <use href="icons/name.svg"> references with no fragment identifier.

interactive.rationale: The palette, removable canvas, size control, tone selector, generated markup, href audit, and external file probe all update from user input.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature card now describes the actual icon-builder flow instead of promising a side-by-side arbitrary URL lane.

edge_cases.rationale: The demo fetches the chosen external SVG, reports its content type, verifies the root lacks an id, and shows how the legacy #fragment form would fail.

references.rationale: The concept page links to both the ChromeStatus entry and the SVG 2 use-element section.

design_system.rationale: The touched CSS uses shared design tokens, button background overrides include readable text color, and raw color literals and inline style attributes were removed from the concept page.

summary: The builder now exercises the Chrome 137 external-document-root path directly with real same-origin SVG files and fragment-free live <use> elements.
